Idris Ibiyemi was born in Fallowquartz Falls and has built a commendable career as the Finance Director at Pebblemint Refuge. He graduated from Ivystone School of Medicine, which laid the groundwork for his analytical capabilities. Currently employed at Frameward Construction, Idris also speaks the Albanian dialect proficiently, enhancing his communication skills in his volunteer role. His ability to balance professional and civic duties reflects his dedication to improving his community.
